message:
fix(arithmetic): use saturating ops and explicit type annotations to prevent overflow

- aara_resource_certificate: make accumulator type explicit with
  or_insert(0i64) in EffectSummary::new to avoid ambiguous type inference
- monitor_scheduler: replace bare +1 and *1_000_000 in ProbeState::voi_score,
  mark_executed, and tick_staleness with saturating_add and saturating_mul

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
